post:

Gemma 4, DeepSeek V4, Kimi K2.6, MiMo 2.5, and GLM-5.1 weights are out.

#OpenModels #LLMWeights #ModelRelease
source_title: Latest open artifacts (#21): Open model bonanza! Gemma 4, DeepSeek V4, Kimi K2.6, MiMo 2.5, GLM-5.1 & others. On CAISI's V4 assessment.

post:
Open-weight LLMs just got cheaper.
KV Sharing, mHC, and Compressed Attention shrink Gemma 4 inference cost ~40%.

#LLMArchitecture #CostOptimization #Gemma4
source_title: Recent Developments in LLM Architectures: KV Sharing, mHC, and Compressed Attention
reason: New open-weight LLMs (Gemma 4, DeepSeek V4) implement cost-saving long-context architectures.
